title: Luffy Challenges Kaido Again
description: On pages 5–8, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Black Maria, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Yamato, Unknown person #8 as The raid becomes a series of decisive matchups while Luffy challenges Kaido and the Straw Hats protect their allies.
scene: The Onigashima raid breaks into decisive one-on-one and group battles as Luffy, Yamato, Momonosuke, and the Straw Hats push against Kaido’s forces.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I've been looking forward to seeing you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I've wanted to see you too!!

dialogue.speaker: Black Maria
dialogue.text: Look how big you've grown, Robin--!

dialogue.speaker: Black Maria
dialogue.text: Robin- San!! Don't Get Any Closer!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I know, but it's such a shame...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: 'I'm no kind airi' hat snake smile

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You should have given me a sign you were unaffected, Robin-san!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How dare they mess with someone's memories like that....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't believe black Maria-sama's illusion didn't work on them!!

dialogue.speaker: Yamato
dialogue.text: It's like this place is haunted!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Looks like you weren't affected either.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was adrift in that mist for 50 years. Of course I dreamt of my friends surviving...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It always hurt when I imagined their faces.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: We're two peas in a pod!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yohohol now we just have to overcome our current ordeal!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Ah!! It's that strange weapon again!!

dialogue.speaker: Yamato
dialogue.text: That human-faced dog keeps starting fires!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War storyline through 38 dialogue beats, focusing on the raid’s momentum, character resolve, and the shifting battle lines.
